name: COMPLIANCE-URLS: each entry requires id, name, url, authoritative_publisher, jurisdiction, applicable_to, identifier_scheme, why_authoritative, fetch_frequency, legal_review_required, paywalled, document_url, attribution_note (per §2.19 operator-facing schema)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "- id: nist-csf-2
  name: NIST CSF 2.0
  url: https://nist.gov/csf
" > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-compliance-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
